regulations.title: FSSAI License Renewal Period
regulations.description: FSSAI license must be renewed every 12 months before expiry

regulations.title: State License Turnover Threshold
regulations.description: Food businesses with turnover above ₹12L need State license (not basic registration)

regulations.title: FSSAI Annual Return Due Date
regulations.description: Annual return in Form D1 due by May 31 every year
